case_title: CITIBANK, N.A. AS TRUSTEE FOR BASST 2007-1, ITS VS. MELA ANNA SAUNDERS et al

docket_entries.description: RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT SAUNDERS, MELA ANNA
